hero.title: Turn paperwork into action.
hero.lead: PaperPilot understands your documents, finds what matters, and tells you what to do next.
hero.copy: Upload a document, screenshot, or PDF. PaperPilot finds deadlines, required documents, important details, and turns them into actionable tasks.
hero.insightCopy: You have 3 documents requiring action this week.

problem.title: Documents shouldn't leave you wondering what to do next.
problem.copy: Important information is scattered across PDFs, emails, screenshots, letters, and forms. Reading is rarely the hard part. Knowing what it means for you is.
questions: What does this mean for me?
What do I need to prepare?

how.title: From paperwork to done.
how.copy: PaperPilot turns any document into a clear plan in three simple steps.

steps.title: Drop your paperwork
steps.copy: Upload a PDF, image, screenshot, or paste the text directly.

steps.title: PaperPilot understands it
steps.copy: The important context, dates, requirements, and urgency are identified for you.

steps.title: Know exactly what to do
steps.copy: Requirements become a practical checklist you can start completing immediately.

how.formats: PDF, PNG, JPG, or paste text

analysis.title: The answer to: “What am I supposed to do?”
analysis.copy: PaperPilot extracts meaning, requirements, and priority into one calm view—so the next decision is obvious.
analysis.whatCopy: A scholarship application for active university students.

story.title: Your paperwork finally has a to-do list.
story.copy: PaperPilot doesn't stop at a summary. It turns what the document asks for into work you can see, finish, and track.

deadline.title: Never let an important deadline disappear inside a PDF.
deadline.copy: Dates are surfaced, organized by urgency, and connected to the work they depend on.
deadline.grouped: PaperPilot has grouped 6 related tasks around these deadlines.

copilot.title: Your documents. One conversation.
copilot.copy: Ask across your paperwork and get answers grounded in the documents already in your workspace.
copilot.question: What should I take care of this week?

useCases.title: Built for the paperwork life throws at you.

stats.disclaimer: Product concepts shown for illustration—not measured performance claims.

security.title: Your documents deserve privacy.
security.copy: PaperPilot is designed with privacy and user control in mind, especially when recommendations can affect real-life decisions.

items.title: Your documents, your control
items.copy: Keep ownership over what enters and leaves your workspace.

items.title: Private by design
items.copy: PaperPilot is designed around privacy and intentional access.

items.title: You approve important actions
items.copy: Review recommendations before anything moves forward.

items.title: No action without confirmation
items.copy: PaperPilot helps you decide; you remain in control.

pricing.title: Simple plans for simpler paperwork.
pricing.copy: Start with a few documents, then choose the workspace that matches how much life admin comes your way.

plans.name: Pro
plans.description: For people who deal with paperwork regularly.

testimonials.title: Clarity people can feel.
testimonials.copy: Demo personas illustrating the kinds of moments PaperPilot is designed to improve.
testimonials.label: PaperPilot testimonials

items.quote: The best part isn't that PaperPilot summarizes documents. It's that I immediately know what I need to do.
items.name: Maya

items.quote: I stopped digging through emails just to remember one deadline. The next action is already waiting for me.
items.name: Daniel

items.quote: PaperPilot turns an intimidating form into a sequence I can actually finish. That changes everything.
items.name: Rina

items.quote: I used to read the same document three times just to make sure I wasn't missing anything. PaperPilot gives me the important parts immediately.
items.name: Alex

items.quote: Deadlines, required files, and next steps finally live in one place instead of being scattered across emails and PDFs.
items.name: Sarah

items.quote: What I like most is that a document doesn't just become a summary. It becomes something I can actually act on.
items.name: Kevin

items.a: PaperPilot is an AI-powered life admin and document assistant. It explains documents, surfaces important details, and turns requirements into clear next steps.

items.q: What types of documents can I upload?
items.a: You can upload PDFs, images, screenshots, and common document files, or paste text directly into your Paper Inbox.

items.q: Is PaperPilot just a PDF summarizer?
items.a: No. A summary is only the beginning. PaperPilot is designed to help you understand, decide, act, and track what a document requires.
Yes. PaperPilot can identify important dates and deadlines in your documents, then connect them to reminders and relevant tasks.
No important action happens without your confirmation. PaperPilot recommends and prepares next steps while you stay in control.

items.q: Can I ask questions about my documents?
items.a: Yes. AI Copilot lets you ask questions across the paperwork in your workspace, including what is due, missing, or needs attention.
PaperPilot is being designed with privacy and user control in mind. Product-specific retention and privacy details will be documented clearly before launch.

items.q: Can I use PaperPilot for work and university documents?
items.a: Yes. PaperPilot is designed for academic, professional, freelance, and everyday paperwork—from applications and contracts to bills and registrations.

footer.ctaTitle: Your paperwork isn't going away. The confusion can.
footer.ctaCopy: Let PaperPilot turn documents into clear next steps.
footer.description: An AI-powered life admin assistant that helps you understand, decide, act, and track.
